decision_brief.brief_completeness_note: Completeness describes whether the brief can support a useful conversation. It is not feasibility, approval, or release evidence.
decision_brief.expert_review_package_status_note: Expert-review package status describes whether the package is ready for expert review, not approval.
decision_brief.evidence_burden_note: Evidence burden is a planning label, not release approval.
decision_brief.boundary: Confidence is not approval. Preliminary decision-support only.
decision_brief.no_backend_note: No backend. No data sent by this site.
decision_brief.no_automatic_sending_note: No automatic sending. Nothing is sent unless you send it from your own email client.
